title: Shower Head High Pressure by StoneStream® Original Filter Shower Head for Hard Water with 3 Spray Settings — with EcoStop Button (ON/Off) for Non-Electric Showers Only
features: BETTER FOR YOU, BETTER FOR THE PLANET — Introducing the new & revolutionary StoneStream EcoPower ionic shower filter system! Our mission is to design a superior shower experience that uses significantly less water, and greatly improves water quality through advanced filtration. Our StoneStream EcoPower water saver shower system cuts consumption by up to 35%, saving you money each year on your water bills.

COMPATIBLE WITH NON-ELECTRIC SHOWERS ONLY — Our Stone Stream ionic shower head features three different spray functions to suit your needs: jetting, rainfall, & massage. The Eco-Stop button maintains water temperature, with no need to use the water valve - perfect for washing long hair, children, and pets. This shower head is only compatible with non-electric showers - for electric showers, we recommend our Non-Stop version.

LESS WATER, HUGE SAVINGS — We've perfected the structure of our water saving shower heads by using anodised aluminium with 250 laser-cut spray holes. This anodised aluminium plate allows mineral residue to simply be wiped away for an instantly refreshed look. This means less clogging and more consistent water flow over the lifespan of your shower.

SOFT, SPRING-LIKE WATER — Our new mixture of three types of mineralised Germanium stones will soften hard water, resulting in a natural spring-like quality. This significantly reduces water impurities and chlorine, which can damage hair and dry out skin. With these purifying effects, the StoneStream EcoPower mineral shower head will help you restore pH balance to your hair and body.

INSTALLS IN MINUTES — If you can replace a lightbulb, you can install StoneStream! Our powerful high pressure StoneStream showerhead is compatible with the international standard connection (2cm connector) which is used in 95% of showers in the world. We also offer professional support for all enquiries and a full year of warranty on all our shower heads.
description: Product Description Better for You. Better for the Planet. Introducing The New StoneStream EcoPower Handheld Showerhead Featuring Mineral Filtration Stones and A STOP Button For An Instant Stop Of Water Flow Improving Your Shower Experience. A few years ago, we were set on a mission to disrupt the overpriced and outdated bathroom industry. We are all about creating high-quality, cost-effective and appealing shower products that have an actual impact on you, your family and the world. Every product we market was built to improve your shower experience by increasing your water flow velocity, purifying your shower water, and saving on your water costs. Softer and Healthier Shower Water Increased Water Flow Velocity Reduced Water Consumption 3-Setting Shower Head with Eco Stop (Non-Electric Showers) 3-in-1 Value Kit with Eco Stop (Non-Electric Showers) 3-Setting Shower Head (All Shower Types) 3-in-1 Value Kit (All Shower Types) Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 6,158 4.1 out of 5 stars 433 4.2 out of 5 stars 6,158 4.1 out of 5 stars 433 Price £25.99 £ 25 . 99 £39.99 £ 39 . 99 £25.99 £ 25 . 99 £39.99 £ 39 . 99 Recommended Use Handheld shower head for non-electric showers Handheld shower head for non-electric showers with replacement stones and 1.5m hose Electric shower compatible handheld shower head Electric shower compatible handheld shower head with replacement stones and 1.5m hose In-Handle Stones ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Replacement Mineral Stones no data ✓ no data ✓ 1.5m Hose no data ✓ no data ✓ Eco-Stop Button ✓ ✓ no data no data Electric Shower Compatible no data no data ✓ ✓ Drinking-Grade Shower Water Built-in mineral filtration stones purify your shower water and remove unwanted substances and compounds such as dirt, chlorine, rust, chalk, calcium, magnesium, heavy metals and more. These materials, in high concentration in your shower water, may cause different issues such as - Mineral build-up on your shower, also known as Limescale Dry and itchy skin and hair Unpleasant odor and taste of your shower water Unhygienic grime build-up which may cause unwanted health conditions StoneStream EcoPower shower heads and water filters are designed to filter out the unwanted materials from your shower water so you and your family can enjoy clean and healthy shower water. Smoother Water Flow and Increased Velocity When we developed the new generation of StoneStream showerheads, we used a variety of spray types, droplet velocities, droplet sizes, and spray angles. It’s a combination, the way the droplets overlap and coalesce, which makes it a good experience. This required a ton of trial and error – a lot more than we thought was necessary. Eventually, we used anodized aluminum for the showerhead plate and perfect the structure with 250 laser-cut spray holes which provided the best results. Just stronger water flow velocity might not feel so nice on the skin so we made sure to design our showerheads in such a way they will also air the water on their way out of the mini-holes to make the water flow feel nice and smooth on the skin and hair . Better For You, Better For The Planet The EcoPower flagship showerhead models feature the STOP button which enables you to instantly stop the water flow without the need to reach your hand to the water valve. That may sound like a slight change, but it makes a tremendous difference. How? You can have your water flow stop while soaping or shampooing, and whilst your eyes are closed and you can instantly release the STOP button. Mum look, no hands! Since the stopping is instant it also helps you save water as you'll waste less if you compare that to the water flowing out while you reaching out to the water valve. The re-engineered EcoPower version sprays water at a higher velocity rate than the standard showerheads you'd normally buy which helps to save the average household roughly 12,000 gallons every year. It makes a fairly significant impact on water consumption which the world lacks and it cuts on your water bill.
